title: carum alpestre
intro: Carum alpestre, also known as Alpine caraway or Mountain caraway, is a perennial herb plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and carminative properties, which make it useful for treating digestive issues, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Carum alpestre include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Carum alpestre can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
